assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths getCleoHome defaults to env-paths data dir for "cleo"
assertionResults.title: getCleoHome defaults to env-paths data dir for "cleo"

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths getCleoHome honours CLEO_HOME override
assertionResults.title: getCleoHome honours CLEO_HOME override

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths getCleoPlatformPaths returns the full PlatformPaths struct
assertionResults.title: getCleoPlatformPaths returns the full PlatformPaths struct

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths getCleoSystemInfo returns a SystemInfo snapshot with cleo paths
assertionResults.title: getCleoSystemInfo returns a SystemInfo snapshot with cleo paths

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths getCleoTemplatesTildePath returns ~-prefixed path under home
assertionResults.title: getCleoTemplatesTildePath returns ~-prefixed path under home

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths getCleoTemplatesTildePath returns absolute path when CLEO_HOME is outside home
assertionResults.title: getCleoTemplatesTildePath returns absolute path when CLEO_HOME is outside home

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths getCleoTemplatesTildePath converts paths under homedir to tilde form
assertionResults.title: getCleoTemplatesTildePath converts paths under homedir to tilde form

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths getCanonicalTemplatesTildePath() always returns the stable ~/.cleo/templates path
assertionResults.title: always returns the stable ~/.cleo/templates path

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths getCanonicalTemplatesTildePath() is immune to CLEO_HOME override
assertionResults.title: is immune to CLEO_HOME override

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths getCanonicalTemplatesTildePath() is immune to CLEO_HOME outside home
assertionResults.title: is immune to CLEO_HOME outside home

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths getCanonicalTemplatesTildePath() produces the correct @-reference for CLEO-INJECTION.md
assertionResults.title: produces the correct @-reference for CLEO-INJECTION.md

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths resolveLegacyCleoDir() returns the override when provided
assertionResults.title: returns the override when provided

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths resolveLegacyCleoDir() returns ~/.cleo when no override is provided
assertionResults.title: returns ~/.cleo when no override is provided

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths resolveLegacyCleoDir() returns ~/.cleo when override is undefined
assertionResults.title: returns ~/.cleo when override is undefined

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths resolveLegacyCleoDir() treats empty string override as falsy
assertionResults.title: treats empty string override as falsy

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths resolveLegacyCleoDir() is immune to CLEO_HOME
assertionResults.title: is immune to CLEO_HOME

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths computeCanonicalProjectId() returns a 12-char hex string
assertionResults.title: returns a 12-char hex string

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths computeCanonicalProjectId() produces the same ID for the same path
assertionResults.title: produces the same ID for the same path

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths legacyProjectId() computes base64url(path).slice(0, 32)
assertionResults.title: computes base64url(path).slice(0, 32)

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths legacyProjectId() produces different IDs for different paths
assertionResults.title: produces different IDs for different paths

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths resolveProjectByCwd() resolves projectId and projectRoot from .cleo/project-info.json in cwd
assertionResults.title: resolves projectId and projectRoot from .cleo/project-info.json in cwd

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths resolveProjectByCwd() walks up ancestors to find .cleo/project-info.json
assertionResults.title: walks up ancestors to find .cleo/project-info.json

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths resolveProjectByCwd() returns null when no .cleo/project-info.json is found
assertionResults.title: returns null when no .cleo/project-info.json is found

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths resolveProjectByCwd() returns null when project-info.json has no projectId
assertionResults.title: returns null when project-info.json has no projectId

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths resolveProjectByCwd() returns null when project-info.json has empty projectId
assertionResults.title: returns null when project-info.json has empty projectId

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths resolveProjectByCwd() skips corrupt project-info.json and continues walking
assertionResults.title: skips corrupt project-info.json and continues walking

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths resolveProjectByCwd() finds valid ancestor when immediate .cleo has no projectId
assertionResults.title: finds valid ancestor when immediate .cleo has no projectId

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths resolveProjectByCwd() uses process.cwd() when no cwd argument
assertionResults.title: uses process.cwd() when no cwd argument

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths resolveProjectByCwd() returns same projectId for different mount paths to same repo (AC5)
assertionResults.title: returns same projectId for different mount paths to same repo (AC5)

assertionResults.title: resolves .cleo dir from a known projectId

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths resolveCanonicalCleoDir() resolves another registered project
assertionResults.title: resolves another registered project

assertionResults.fullName: cleo-paths resolveCanonicalCleoDir() returns null for unknown projectId
assertionResults.title: returns null for unknown projectId

assertionResults.title: returns null when nexus.db does not exist

assertionResults.title: resolves .cleo dir via legacy ID alias (AC4)
